positive: A whimsical watercolor illustration of a group of friendly forest creatures (foxes, deer, and baby badgers) gathered around a glowing mushroom patch. The style should be highly detailed, ethereal, and incorporate soft pastel tones, evoking a cottagecore fantasy aesthetic. Intricate flora and fauna, soft lighting, storybook illustration, high saturation.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh edges, photorealistic, gritty
